goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'primavera'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'area', and 'attraction type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stansted airport' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should 'arrive by 13:15'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called primavera
Make sure you get address, area, and attraction type
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to stansted airport and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on wednesday and should arrive by 13:15
Make sure you get travel time and train ID
